basic_details.job_title: Patna High Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for District Judge -2026 Posts
basic_details.post_name: District Judge (Entry Level), Direct From Bar Exam-2026
basic_details.short_information: Patna High Court has released the official notification for the District Judge (Entry Level), Direct From Bar Exam-2026 Recruitment to fill 8 permanent District Judge posts through direct recruitment from eligible Advocates and Judicial Officers. This is a prestigious judiciary opportunity for candidates with 7 years or more of legal practice or judicial service, offering a high-level pay scale under Level J-5 of the judicial pay matrix.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 35 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocates/Judicial Officers with 7 years of practice or more.
qualification.details: Advocate/Pleader with 7 years or more of continuous practice Government Pleaders and Public Prosecutors with 7 years or more of continuous practice Judicial Officers with 7 years or more of continuous practice Person in judicial service with combined experience of 7 years or more as an Advocate or Judicial Officer

vacancy_details.Post Name: District Judge (Entry Level), Direct from Bar Exam-2026
District Judge (Entry Level), Direct from Bar Exam-2023
District Judge (Entry Level), Direct from Bar Exam-2021

salary_details.details: Revised pay scale of Rs. 144840-194660/- Level : J-5 (pre-revised pay scale of Rs. 51550-1230-58930-1380-63070/-)

selection_process: Screening Test (if held) Written Test Viva-Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Patna High Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Patna High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Patna High Court District Judge recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Patna High Court District Judge (Entry Level) posts is 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the District Judge post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the District Judge (Entry Level) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the District Judge position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the District Judge (Entry Level) position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates and have at least 7 years of continuous practice as an Advocate/Pleader or as a Judicial Officer.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the District Judge post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the District Judge (Entry Level) posts in the Patna High Court.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General category candidates is Rs. 1500.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the District Judge position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the revised pay scale of Rs. 144840-194660/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Patna High Court District Judge recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening Test (if held), a Written Test, and a Viva-Voce Test.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from other states can apply, but the fee structure might differ for SC/ST and OH candidates from Bihar.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, or directly from the Patna High Court's official website.
